signals.headline: ETH ETF Inflows Hit $275M Weekly High (Strongest Since January), Driving Price to $2,288+ | YES | HIGH**
signals.raw:
ETH ETF Inflows Hit $275M Weekly High (Strongest Since January), Driving Price to $2,288+ | YES | HIGH**  
Ethereum ETFs recorded over $275 million in weekly inflows—the strongest since January 2026—with Fidelity’s FETH and BlackRock’s ETHA leading, coinciding with a 7% ETH price rise to nearly $2,400 amid a broader market rally.[1]
